summary: Callback performance optimization fully verified. Hubtel callback endpoint responds in ~0.2 seconds (well under 1s requirement). All 13 tests passed: callback response time, callback logging to database, background async processing, admin callback-logs endpoint, admin payment-debug endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Callback endpoint returns HTTP 200 in ~0.2 seconds (was 19+ seconds before fix)
✅ BackgroundTasks properly used for async processing after immediate response
✅ Callbacks logged to callback_logs collection with id, received_at, raw_body, source_ip, processed flag
✅ Background process_callback_async correctly processes payment and calls complete_payment
✅ Admin callback-logs endpoint returns all logged callbacks with proper authentication
✅ Admin payment-debug endpoint provides comprehensive diagnosis across momo_payments, hubtel_payments, transactions, and callback_logs collections
✅ Error handling properly logs errors in callback record when payment not found
seed_data_creation: Test callbacks created during tests are logged to callback_logs collection with TEST-* prefixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Callback performance optimization verified. Hubtel callback endpoint at POST /api/payments/hubtel/callback now responds in ~0.2s using FastAPI BackgroundTasks. Admin endpoints: GET /api/payments/admin/callback-logs?admin_secret=sdm-admin-2026 and GET /api/payments/admin/payment-debug/{ref}?admin_secret=sdm-admin-2026

POST /api/payments/hubtel/callback.notes: Returns immediately with HTTP 200 and processes in background
tested_scenarios: Background processing marks callback as processed

GET /api/payments/admin/callback-logs.notes: Returns logged callbacks with full details including source_ip

GET /api/payments/admin/payment-debug/{r.notes: Provides comprehensive diagnosis across all payment collections
tested_scenarios: Shows callback logs for the reference

GET /api/payments/debug/callback-test.notes: Debug endpoint to verify callback endpoint reachability

features_verified: Callback endpoint response time < 1 second (was 19+ seconds)
Callback is logged to callback_logs collection immediately
Background processing runs after immediate response
complete_payment is triggered for successful callbacks
Admin callback-logs endpoint returns logged callbacks
Admin payment-debug endpoint shows correct diagnosis
